audit_summary.summary_text: The BEN05 'retry-helper' skill contains only standard Python utility code for retry logic patterns (exponential backoff, circuit breaker, per-attempt timeout). All code operates purely in-process with no network I/O, file system access, environment variable reads, or external transmissions. The implementations use only Python stdlib modules (time, random, signal, enum). Declared purpose and actual code logic are fully aligned.
